title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop]
description: The tunnel does not have a natural curve, its architects instead favoring a more severe jutting in either direction away.  The far corner of this turning point slopes down, leading into a hollowed-out semicircular bowl.  Several cascading rows of benches are carved between stairs leading down, each covered with many pillows for seating.  At the bottom, a polished stone table has been placed as a makeshift podium.  Opposite this miniature amphitheater is a deep white stone fireplace striated with pure silver.
